## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes (Biome)
- [ ] `npm run build` passes (tsc)
- [ ] `npm test` passes — added/updated tests where it makes sense
- [ ] Updated `README.md` / `CHANGELOG.md` if behavior or the public API changed
- [ ] No secrets / API keys in code, tests, or logs
